author: desiderium-wav
name: Quote
short: Quote messages in a stylized format with optional archive channel
description: Capture and quote messages in a stylized format similar to Discord's 'Make it a Quote' bot. Reply to a message with the quote command to create a formatted quote with the original sender's information, timestamp, and an embedded image showing the message. Quotes can be automatically sent to a configured archive channel.
install_msg: Quote cog loaded successfully. Use [p]quote or [p]q to quote messages. Use [p]quotecfg to configure.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores per-guild configuration (quotes channel ID, log channel ID) for quote archiving. Quotes are not persisted - they are generated on-demand.
usage: Reply to a message with [p]quote or [p]q to create a styled quote. Configure with [p]quotecfg.
